sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: O’Dowd William IV buys Dolphin Entertainment (DLPN) shares worth $4867 By Investing.com
feed.summary: William O’Dowd IV, CEO of Dolphin Entertainment (DLPN), recently purchased 3,100 shares of the company's common stock for $4,867 on March 30, 2026. This transaction increased his direct ownership to 456,290 shares, with additional indirect holdings. Concurrently, Dolphin Entertainment reported a 10% revenue increase to $56.7 million and reduced net loss for Q4 and full-year 2025, while its stock is considered undervalued by InvestingPro analysis despite volatility.

feed.title: What Quanta Services (PWR)'s Dividend Affirmation and Expanded Power-Tech Ambitions Mean For Shareholders
feed.summary: Quanta Services (PWR) recently affirmed a quarterly cash dividend and outlined ambitious long-term targets at its 2026 Investor Day, emphasizing an expanded role in power, technology, and supply chain capabilities. The company aims for $37.5 billion in revenue and $1.7 billion in earnings by 2028, driven by grid modernization and data center power demand. While the dividend and long-term goals reinforce confidence, the article notes that some analysts remain cautious due to potential project delays and the company's reliance on large, multi-year projects.

feed.title: Realty Income’s US$800m Notes Add To Funding Mix And Valuation Story
feed.summary: Realty Income (NYSE:O) has issued $800 million in senior unsecured notes due 2033 to be used for general corporate purposes, including debt repayment and acquisitions. This financing diversifies the company's funding mix and provides long-term, fixed-rate capital to support its growth initiatives. While the notes add to the funding mix, investors should monitor the impact on funds from operations and interest coverage, particularly given existing concerns about interest payments not being well covered by earnings.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Acquires 19,608 Shares of KB Financial Group Inc $KB
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has increased its stake in KB Financial Group Inc (NYSE:KB) by 45.4%, acquiring an additional 19,608 shares, bringing its total ownership to 62,786 shares valued at $5.21 million. Other institutional investors like First Horizon Corp and Jones Financial Companies Lllp also adjusted their positions. KB Financial Group, a South Korea-based financial holding company, recently posted quarterly earnings of $1.43 per share and has an average analyst rating of "Moderate Buy."

feed.title: Ventas Inc Stock: A Steady Healthcare REIT with Long-Term Senior Housing Demand Driving Value for North American Investors
feed.summary: Ventas Inc (US9182041080) is highlighted as a leading U.S. healthcare REIT, focusing on senior housing, medical offices, and life sciences. The company is poised to benefit from aging demographics in North America, driving demand for healthcare infrastructure and providing a steady income stream to investors through its dividend structure. Its diversified portfolio, strategic asset management, and strong balance sheet position it favorably amidst sector growth, despite potential risks from interest rates and regulatory changes.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson Vision leader explains significance of latest IOL milestone
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson Vision received FDA approval for its Tecnis PureSee intraocular lens (IOL), designed to provide patients with an extended depth of focus and clear vision with minimal visual disturbances. Peter Menziuso, Company Group Chair, Vision, Johnson & Johnson, emphasized that this IOL is the first and only EDOF IOL in the U.S. without a warning on loss of contrast sensitivity, offering a significant advancement in cataract care. He highlighted the importance of personalized options for patients and surgeons, expanding the Tecnis platform to address a wide range of visual needs.

feed.title: Clorox Finalizes Acquisition of GOJO Industries, Makers of Purell®
feed.summary: The Clorox Co. has completed its acquisition of GOJO Industries, makers of Purell®, integrating GOJO's health and hygiene solutions into its product portfolio. The newly named "Clorox Purell" business will continue to be based in Akron, Ohio, led by President Carey Jaros. This acquisition aims to leverage both companies' strengths to deliver best-in-class health and hygiene solutions to consumers and institutions.

feed.title: Jefferies Maintains Hold on LULU (Lululemon Athletica Inc.) March 2026
feed.summary: Jefferies maintained a Hold rating on Lululemon Athletica Inc. (LULU) on March 17, 2026, citing persistent challenges related to the company's EPS guide, which suggests margin and demand pressures. The firm's stance signals continued uncertainty and a call for patience from investors, recommending monitoring upcoming quarterly reports and management signals. Meyka AI also rated LULU with a B+, suggesting a neutral-to-cautious outlook.

feed.title: U.S. Stock Movements | Global chemical prices enter an upward cycle, with Dow Inc rising over 3% in pre-market trading.
feed.summary: Dow Inc (DOW.US) saw a pre-market rise of 3.2% to $42 due to escalating geopolitical tensions in the Middle East impacting crude oil and chemical raw material transportation. This has led to 14 leading petrochemical companies worldwide declaring force majeure, affecting over 60 million tons per year of production capacity and triggering collective price adjustments of up to 50% by major global chemical companies. As a result, global chemical product prices have entered an upward cycle.

feed.title: Synopsys Inc. Stock: Leading EDA Provider Poised for AI-Driven Growth in Semiconductor Design
feed.summary: Synopsys Inc. is positioned as a key enabler of AI-driven growth in the semiconductor industry, providing essential electronic design automation (EDA) tools for advanced chip design. The company's focus on AI-optimized tools, cloud computing, and strategic acquisitions like Ansys strengthens its market leadership despite competition and geopolitical risks. North American investors are advised to monitor Synopsys for exposure to AI infrastructure and its resilience compared to cyclical chipmakers.

feed.title: Agilent Technologies “in country, for country” strategy helps mitigate supply disruptions
feed.summary: Agilent Technologies has implemented an "in country, for country" manufacturing strategy and diversified supply chains to build resilience against global disruptions. This approach has prevented material impact to their supply chain, even amidst current geopolitical tensions. The company recently opened a Customer Experience Center in Mumbai and a refurbishment center in Manesar, emphasizing their commitment to local services and affordable solutions for customers in India.

feed.title: The Opioid Crisis Was an Innovation Failure. Vertex Just Showed a Way to Fix It
feed.summary: The opioid crisis highlights a long-standing issue in pain management, where aggressive treatment risks addiction, and conservative approaches leave patients in pain. Vertex Pharmaceuticals has introduced Journavx, a non-opioid pain medicine that addresses this dilemma by targeting pain signals before they reach the brain, avoiding the reward pathways associated with opioids. This innovation illustrates a new model for drug development focused on validated biology and tight execution, moving away from the costly "shots-on-goal" approach that has historically failed to deliver effective results.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Initiates Coverage for Carpenter Technology (CRS) with Equal-Weight Rating and $400 Price Target | CRS Stock News
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has initiated coverage on Carpenter Technology (CRS) with an Equal-Weight rating and a price target of $400.00, according to analyst David Strauss. This new coverage adds to a series of recent analyst activities for CRS, including a Positive rating from Susquehanna and Buy/Overweight ratings from BTIG and JP Morgan with various price target adjustments. The average target price from 8 analysts is $413.50, implying a slight upside, while GuruFocus estimates a fair value of $174.31, suggesting a significant downside.

feed.title: Raymond James upgrades Wingstop stock rating on valuation
feed.summary: Raymond James upgraded Wingstop (NASDAQ:WING) to Strong Buy from Outperform but lowered its price target to $240 from $325. The upgrade follows a 44% decline in the stock, placing shares near their 52-week low and in oversold territory. The firm sees an attractive risk-reward profile due to the stock's valuation, despite recent weaker sales, and maintains that Wingstop's long-term unit growth story remains intact.

feed.title: Libya Deploys AI-Driven Drilling Operation as SLB Doubles Al-Khair Speeds
feed.summary: Libya has successfully implemented its first AI-driven directional drilling operation at the Al-Khair oil field, using advanced AI solutions from SLB. This groundbreaking deployment doubled drilling penetration rates, enabled fully autonomous well placement, and delivered 1,060 barrels per day from a single horizontal well section. The initiative signals a strategic shift towards digitizing upstream operations, aiming to boost Libya's production targets and attract international investment.

feed.title: Florida National Burrito Day deals Port St. Lucie, Vero Beach, Stuart
feed.summary: Several restaurants on the Treasure Coast, including Chipotle, Moe's Southwest Grill, Bubbakoo's Burritos, and Chronic Tacos, are offering deals and promotions for National Burrito Day on April 2, 2026. Deals range from BOGO offers to delivery fee waivers and chances to win free burritos for a year. The article also lists local addresses for these restaurants in the Treasure Coast area.

feed.title: Out-of-state banks continue targeting Florida
feed.summary: Out-of-state banks continue to expand their presence in Florida, with Regions Bank planning to add 16 to 20 branches, primarily in Miami, and also evaluating growth in Northeast Florida. This expansion is happening despite many customers banking online, as banks believe brick-and-mortar branches still provide important connections for complex transactions. Other Jacksonville-area businesses also made news, including Shoe Carnival slowing its Shoe Station conversions, Community First Credit Union's quadrupled earnings, Cadre Holdings acquiring Alien Gear Holsters, and ParkerVision reporting a 2025 net loss while pursuing patent infringement lawsuits.

feed.title: National Burrito Day 2026: Here are the deals and freebies from Chipotle, Moe’s and more
feed.summary: National Burrito Day is celebrated on the first Thursday of April, and in 2026, it falls on April 2nd. Numerous restaurants, including Chipotle, Moe's Southwest Grill, QDOBA, Del Taco, and more, are offering special deals and freebies to mark the occasion. These promotions range from free delivery and buy-one-get-one offers to discounted burritos and rewards for future visits.
